productDisplayName: Lino Perros Women Black Mobile Pouch
description: Style NoteUnderstated and compact, yet spacious, this Linos Perros bag works the military aesthetic with its rugged cool. Add this to your accessory arsenal and you'll not regret it. The right bag for versatile styling, use this piece to pare down a dressy frock for a casual do or to add a hint of sporty to an oh-so-girly ensemble.Product DetailsPolyester blend upperAppliquéd brand patch on the frontOne flap with a velcro closure and a zipped pocket insideOne main zipped pocket with an insert pocketA removable and adjustable shoulder strap made of fabricMaterial and CareBlended polyesterWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dustSizeHeight: 13 cmWidth: 10.5 cmDepth: 5 cm
